title: What We Know About the Gun Battle Off the Coast of Cuba
author: Patricia Mazzei, Frances Robles, Jack Nicas, Eric Schmitt and Yan Zhuang
fullText: Four armed Cubans aboard a Florida-based speedboat died in a gunfight with Cuban border troops on Wednesday, officials said.
summary: Four armed Cubans aboard a Florida-based speedboat died in a gunfight with Cuban border troops on Wednesday, officials said.
